descriptions: NPK and OFB member SJ jointly involved in murder, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2020, members of NPK, alongside SJ of OFB, were sentenced to life for the murder of Kamali Gabbidon-Lynck

descriptions: SJ and others convicted of murder were linked to NPK; SJ is an OFB member.
edges.evidence_quote: The convicted group was reportedly linked to Tottenham gang NPK.

descriptions: Bandokay cited 67 as an influence.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandokay credited fellow OFB rapper Headie One as a major influence, as well as UK drill group 67 and American rapper Lil Durk.

descriptions: OFB members Headie One and RV were originally in Star Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.

descriptions: Members of Star Gang formed OFB.
edges.evidence_quote: Two members of Star Gang, Headz (now known as Headie One ) and Young RV (now known as RV ), later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB (Original Farm Boys).

descriptions: OFB is preceded by Star Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: OFB (Original Farm Boys) is the current gang associated with the Broadwater Farm Estate. They were preceded by Star Gang

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (2014–2026) Tupamaro , FARC-EP

descriptions: Tupamaro movement supports ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN has received support from the Tupamaro movement in Venezuela

descriptions: Infobox lists Genna crime family as an ally.

descriptions: Genna crime family was an ally of the Chicago Outfit.

edges.evidence_quote: the North Siders then went after the Genna brothers, leaders of the Genna crime family

descriptions: In the 1990s, Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone clashed with Ferrentino-Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Novanta scoppia la faida di Laureana di Borrello tra gli Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone e i Ferrentino-Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino

descriptions: The Mancuso ordered the murder of Chindamo members, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: il boss Giuseppe Mancuso per aiutare la 'ndrina dei Cutellè ... ordina l'omicidio di Vincenzo e Antonio Chindamo

'Ndrina Loielo.description: The Loielo are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Ariola, a frazione of Gerocarne, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria. Their criminal activities include extortion and drug trafficking. They rose to power in the 1970s and were allied with the Maiolo family until a decade-long feud in the 1990s, which they won. In the 2000s, they lost dominance to the Emanuele family. The group was largely dismantled by the 2012 'Light in the Woods' operation.

descriptions: Gallace sided with Loielo in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: dall'altra Nazzareno Salvatore Emanuele, legato alla 'ndrina dei Loielo, per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: Loielo bosses were killed in 2002 due to conflicts with the Emanuele.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002 vengono uccisi in un agguato di stampo mafioso i due capi della 'ndrina Giuseppe e Vincenzo Loielo , per contrasti con gli Emanuele

descriptions: A feud (faida) broke out between Loielo and Maiolo in 1989 lasting ten years.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1989 scoppia la faida con i Maiolo, per il controllo del territorio, che dura dieci anni

descriptions: Loielo and Maiolo were allies until the late 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati con la famiglia 'ndranghetista dei Maiolo fino alla fine degli anni '80

descriptions: Loielo and Emanuele were opposing sides in the Faida delle Pre serre vibonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida delle Pre serre vibonesi : è una faida scoppiata nel 2002 tra i Loielo e il loro sottogruppo degli Emanuele

descriptions: Mancuso and Loielo members were arrested together, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: arresto di due esponenti dei Mancuso, tra cui il presunto boss Pantaleone, detto Scarpuni, e uno della famiglia Loielo di Gerocarne

descriptions: The Outlaws absorbed the Booze Runners Motorcycle Club to form their Stateline chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1991, the club also initiated its "Stateline" chapter in Antioch by absorbing the Booze Runners Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Bloque Cacique Nutibara fought and subdued Bloque Metro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sus más de 1000 integrantes fueron combatidos y luego sometidos por el Bloque Cacique Nutibara al mando de Don Berna.

descriptions: Members of Bloque Metro joined BCN in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: Parte de los integrantes del Bloque Metro de las AUC, terminó en las filas del BCN, iniciando el año 2003.

'Ndrina Bonavota.description: The Bonavota are a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Onofrio and Stefanaconi in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italy. They have members in Piedmont (Turin, Carmagnola, Moncalieri) and Rome. Their activities include extortion, usury, drug trafficking, and money laundering. They have been involved in a bloody feud with the Petrolo-Bartolotta clans in the 1990s.

descriptions: Anello and Bonavota had joint commercial interests in Maierato and share the area of Pizzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ai Cracolici e ai Bonavota avrebbero avuto interessi commerciali su Maierato mentre a Pizzo l'area e suddivisa solo con i Bonavota

descriptions: Bonavota is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina.

descriptions: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: The Cracolici are a rival cosca to the Bonavota.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002 viene ucciso a Maierato Alfredo Cracolici e a Pizzo il 4 maggio 2004 Raffaele Cracolici, appartenenti ad una cosca rivale

descriptions: The Giampà refused to help the Cracolici out of respect for the Bonavota.
edges.evidence_quote: i quali avrebbero chiesto aiuto ai Giampà , che non si sono resi disponibili in quanto non avrebbero voluto fare 'sgarbo' ai Bonavota

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Lo Bianco.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina.

descriptions: The Bonavota are allies of the Lo Bianco.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: The Mancuso intervened against the Bonavota by supplying weapons to the opposing faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella faida intervennero contro i Bonavota anche i Mancuso , i quali avrebbero fornito armi alla fazione opposta

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina.

descriptions: The Bonavota are allies of the Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: The Bonavota were involved in a bloody feud against the Petrolo-Bartolotta.
edges.evidence_quote: sono stati coinvolti in una sanguinaria faida contro le cosche Petrolo-Bartolotta di Sant'Onofrio e Stefanaconi

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Commisso per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mancuso 'ndrina , Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Cracolici and Bonavota are in conflict over control of Sant'Onofrio.
edges.evidence_quote: Dall'operazione Conquista del 2017 e conseguente omonimo processo del 2018 ancora in corso si registrano degli scontri con i Bonavota per il dominio di Sant'Onofrio.

descriptions: Bonavota seeks support from Commisso against Mancuso, indicating conflict with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: altre meno potenti del vibonese come gli Anello , i Fiumara, gli Emanuele di Gerocarne , i Vallelunga , i Tassone, i Mantella, i Bonavota e i Piscopisani cercano appoggio nei Commisso

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Bonavota in the vibonese area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti nel vibonese con i Bonavota

descriptions: Bishnoi Gang killed a member of Khalistan Tiger Force.
edges.evidence_quote: Bishnoi's associates murdered Sukhdool Singh Gill, a member of the pro-Khalistani Khalistan Tiger Force, considered a terrorist organization by India.

Autodefensas Campesinas de Casanare.description: Colombian paramilitary group founded in 1979 by Héctor José Buitrago Rodríguez. Initially involved in land dispossession, drug trafficking, and extortion, later financed by oil royalties and land holdings. Led by 'Martín Llanos' after 1997, it fought rival paramilitaries and guerrillas in Casanare and Meta departments. The group is still active.

descriptions: ACC refused to join AUC, considering it a drug trafficking project.
edges.evidence_quote: Las ACC no entraron a las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia, una especie de grupo federado que buscó avalar a todos los grupos paramilitares del país creada por los hermanos Castaño en 1997, pues consideraban que era un proyecto del narcotráfico.

descriptions: ACC fought a bloody war with Bloque Centauros for control of Casanare.
edges.evidence_quote: Entre 2003 y 2004 se desató de manera muy cruenta el conflicto entre las ACC con el Bloque Centauros de Arroyave por el control del departamento de Casanare.

descriptions: ACC waged war against the Feliciano family after they made a deal with the justice system.
edges.evidence_quote: Un tiempo después iniciaron una guerra con los antiguos socios de su padre, los Feliciano, debido a que esta familia hizo un acuerdo con la justicia para salirse del proyecto paramilitar.

descriptions: ELN is listed as an enemy of ACC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP, ELN , Bloque Centauros de las AUC

descriptions: FARC-EP is listed as an enemy of ACC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP, ELN , Bloque Centauros de las AUC

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP , ELN , Disidencias del EPL , ACC , Bloque Metro (Disidencia de AUC)

descriptions: The Centauros clashed with the ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: the Centauros soon began clashing with a rival paramilitary group, the Peasant Self-Defense Forces of Casanare (ACC).

descriptions: Bloque Centauros (precursor of Clan del Golfo) attacked ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: El Bloque Centauros emprendería una serie de ataques en contra de un grupo paramilitar que militaba la zona, que era conocido por el nombre de Autodefensas Campesinas de Casanare (ACC).

descriptions: The Alkhalil family and Duhre brothers have been in a violent feud since 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: A long-standing feud with the three Duhre brothers started at the beginning of the century.

descriptions: The Duhre brothers were former members of the Punjabi mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Duhre brothers had once been part of the Punjabi mafia and worked alongside Bindy Johal in the 1990s.

'Ndrina Vrenna.description: The 'Ndrina Vrenna is a mafia clan ('ndrina) based in Crotone, Calabria, Italy. Founded by Luigi Vrenna, who served as capobastone until his arrest in 1974 for ordering the murder of two children, sparking the Faida di Crotone. The clan engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and arms smuggling, with operations extending to Lazio and Emilia-Romagna. It was heavily targeted by law enforcement operations such as Heracles and Old Family, leading to numerous arrests.

descriptions: Listed as allied 'ndrine in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura

descriptions: Vrenna and Bonaventura are co-affiliated in the same criminal operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 8 aprile 2008 con l'operazione Heracles vengono arrestate 39 persone presunte affiliate alle cosche Vrenna, Bonaventura e Corigliano

descriptions: Members of Vrenna and Bonaventura moved away and closer to Megna and Russelli due to a split.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti delle cosche Vrenna e Bonaventura , a causa di una divisione di queste si sono allontanati e avvicinati ai Megna e ai Russelli

descriptions: After a bloody feud, Vrenna formed a strong alliance with Ciampà.
edges.evidence_quote: In seguito a una cruente faida i Vrenna hanno stretto una forte alleanza con un'altra famiglia crotonese: la potente famiglia Ciampà.

descriptions: Vrenna and Corigliano are co-affiliated in the same criminal operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 8 aprile 2008 con l'operazione Heracles vengono arrestate 39 persone presunte affiliate alle cosche Vrenna, Bonaventura e Corigliano

descriptions: Vrenna is connected with Grande Aracri among other families.

descriptions: Black Diamond Riders defeated Golden Hawk Riders in the Battle of Pebblestone in 1962.
edges.evidence_quote: Guindon had sought vengeance on the Black Diamond Riders ever since the 1962 brawl known as the 'Battle of Pebblestone', where they defeated the Golden Hawk Riders (with Guindon a member at the time).

descriptions: Satan's Choice opposed Golden Hawk Riders joining Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Several members of Satan' Choice warned the Golden Hawk Riders, including their sergeant-at-arms, Bill 'Heavy' Matiyek, who had a reputation as a hothead, not to go through with the planned 'patch over'.

descriptions: Untouchables MC was a Hells Angels ally that shot Outlaws members.
edges.evidence_quote: Outlaws president Thore "Henki" Holm and a French Outlaws member were subsequently shot and wounded by a member of the Untouchables MC, a Hells Angels ally.

Boyd Gang.description: The Boyd Gang was a notorious criminal gang based in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, active in the late 1940s and early 1950s. Named after member Edwin Alonzo Boyd, the gang committed bank robberies, jail breaks, and engaged in gunfights with police. The gang was known for two dramatic escapes from the Don Jail and the murder of a police officer. All members were eventually captured and convicted.

descriptions: Morello and Lupo united through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1903, Lupo married Morello's half-sister, uniting both organizations.

Hard Livings.description: The Hard Livings gang is a large street gang and organized crime group based in Manenberg, Cape Town, South Africa. Founded in 1971 by Rashied Staggie and his twin brother Rashaad, it started as a criminal street gang involved in drug distribution. The gang evolved into a structured criminal organization involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, prostitution, contract killing, extortion, illegal diamond smuggling, and other activities. It has international connections, including cooperation with the Sicilian mafia.

descriptions: 1400 EstateBoyz is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: Smaller gangs in Cape Town that might be allied to one of the two larger umbrella gangs include Young Dixie Boys, Clever Kids, Naughty Boys, the Junky Funky Kids,1400 EstateBoyz ,Respectable Peacefuls, Wonder Kids, School Boys and Yuru Cats.

La Rosa 'ndrina.description: The La Rosa 'ndrina is a mafia clan based in Tropea, Italy, allied with the Mancuso clan of Limbadi. They have been in a feud with the rival Piserà clan and since the 2000s have expanded into Santa Domenica di Ricadi. The clan is involved in extortion, drug trafficking, and illegal control of tourist services.

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina lists La Rosa 'ndrina as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina , Bellocco 'ndrina , Pesce 'ndrina , La Rosa 'ndrina

descriptions: Mancuso and La Rosa affiliates were arrested together, indicating a link.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono arrestate trentacinque persone ... contro gli affiliati della cosca Mancuso e i La Rosa di Tropea

descriptions: Mancuso and La Rosa were targeted together in operation Costa pulita, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Costa pulita" ... contro i Mancuso ... e le 'ndrine Accorinti , La Rosa e Grande

descriptions: La Rosa was created with the consent of 'Ndrangheta for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: sempre con il consenso della 'ndrangheta per controllare il traffico di droga nella zona

descriptions: La Rosa is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: La Rosa and Accorinti were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: They are allied with the Mancuso 'ndrina of Limbadi.

descriptions: La Rosa is allied with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleata dei Mancuso di Limbadi

descriptions: La Rosa settled in territory previously ruled by the Carones, implying displacement or rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: since the 2000s have begun a settlement in the locality of Santa Domenica di Ricadi until then ruled by the local 'ndrina of the Carones close to the Mancusos.

descriptions: La Rosa and Grande were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: the Costa clean operation ... against the Mancusos and in particular ... the Accorinti 'ndrine, La Rosa and Grande

descriptions: La Rosa is in a feud with the Piserà 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: The La Rosa are in feud with the rival clan the Piserà 'ndrina

descriptions: La Rosa is in a feud with Piserà.
edges.evidence_quote: sono in faida con il clan rivale dei Piserà

descriptions: Piserà 'ndrina and La Rosa 'ndrina are in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Since the 1990s, they are in a feud with the La Rosa 'ndrina

descriptions: The Piserà clan was in a feud with the La Rosa clan in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '90 del secolo scorso erano in faida con i La Rosa , anch'essi di Tropea .

descriptions: La Rosa is a sub-group (propagine) of SCU.
edges.evidence_quote: Rogoli affidò a Oronzo Romano e Giovanni Dalena la costituzione di un'altra 'ndrina propagine della SCU nel sud barese chiamata La Rosa

descriptions: Los Chachos disputed drug corridors with the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Una de las primeras misiones de Los Zetas fue erradicar a Los Chachos, un grupo de narcotraficantes a las órdenes del Cártel del Milenio, que disputaba los corredores de drogas de Tamaulipas con el Cartel del Golfo en 2003.

descriptions: Los Negros formed from remnants of Los Chachos.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was originally formed from the remnants of the Los Chachos gang from Nuevo Laredo

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with D'Onofrio in the Turin area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel torinese con i Catalano e D'Onofrio

descriptions: Fifteen MC was a feeder club for Outlaws in Finland.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws entered Finland via Russia, when a feeder club called Fifteen MC South Karelia was established in Lappeenranta in 2012 with support from a Russian Outlaws chapter.

descriptions: EMC is a dissident faction of FARC that rejects the peace deal.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 2024 the government announced an end to a ceasefire with the smaller dissident FARC faction the Estado Mayor Central, EMC, who reject the 2016 peace deal.

Gate Keepers Motorcycle Club.description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2013 in Musquodoboit Harbour, Nova Scotia. Operates as a support club for the Hells Angels in Canada, with chapters in Ontario and formerly in Nova Scotia. Known for rapid expansion and rivalry with Bacchus Motorcycle Club. Still active as of 2025.

descriptions: Gate Keepers and Bacchus compete for dominance but have no direct conflict; Bacchus has been aligned with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The relationship between the Bacchus and the Gate Keepers is complicated. While they're both competing to be the dominant biker club in the province, the Bacchus have been aligned with the Hells Angels in the past, and there is no indication of direct conflict between the two clubs.

descriptions: The Darksiders MC chapter in Bridgewater merged into Gate Keepers by patching over.
edges.evidence_quote: Bridgewater, Nova Scotia's Darksiders MC chapter patched over to become Gate Keepers

descriptions: Hells Angels and Gatekeepers attended the funeral of a Gatekeepers member together, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Hundreds of Hells Angels, Gatekeepers and several other support clubs arrived in London to show their support for Sinclair's funeral.

descriptions: Gate Keepers is a support club for Hells Angels, with members aspiring to join Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: It operates as a support club for the Hells Angels in Canada

descriptions: Red Devils MC is listed as an ally of Gate Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels, Red Devils Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Gate Keepers is a support club for Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gate Keepers Motorcycle Club, a Hells Angels support club with chapters in Nova Scotia and Ontario, also have a charter in London.

descriptions: Hells Angels formed alliances with Gate Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, the club has also formed alliances with various street gangs, including the Independent Soldiers, the Red Scorpions, the United Nations and the White Boy Posse, and smaller motorcycle gangs, such as Bacchus, the Gate Keepers and the Red Devils.

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf fought alongside the Maute Group in the Battle of Marawi.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2017, Hapilon and other members of Abu Sayyaf joined the Islamic extremist Maute Group based in Lanao del Sur during their attempt to seize control of Marawi City.

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf is allied with Maute Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Maute Group , Al-Qaeda (formerly)

descriptions: Maute Group is listed as an ally of Abu Sayyaf in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Maute Group , Al-Qaeda (formerly)

descriptions: Maute Group is listed as an ally of Abu Sayyaf.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Maute Group

descriptions: Maute Group is part of the Islamic State's Philippines Province.
edges.evidence_quote: Philippines Province Maute Group

descriptions: Maute Group is listed as a group of Islamic State in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Philippines Province ... Maute Group

descriptions: Maute Group is part of IS Philippines Province.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Philippines Province ... Maute Group

descriptions: ISPP emerged from Maute Group.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: Jaysh Ayman is a Kenya-based affiliate unit of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: then with a unit established in 2013 known as Jaysh Ayman
